name_en: M41937 Light Blue! Made of top-grain calfskin! Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth snap closure on a rounded flap. It has an interior slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back slip pocket.
name_cn:
M41937 Light Blue! Made of top-grain calfskin! Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth snap closure on a rounded flap. It has an interior slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back slip pocket.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm.
